Miscellaneous items (included in amounts shown above)
Pursuant to section 3 of Public Law 117–5, on a fiscal calendar that began on March 1, 2021, at the discretion of the Secretary of Agriculture with
coordination with the Forest Service, the Forest Service may make forest restoration or reforestation expenditures of $5 million with unobligated balances
without regard for fiscal year funding restrictions. This new authorization of spending is for fiscal year 2021 only, consistent with this law.
